shared_facts: Lindsey Graham, a U.S. Senator from South Carolina, died at age 71.
Graham died on a Saturday following a brief and sudden illness.
latest_clusters.synthesis: Senator Lindsey Graham of South Carolina has died at age 71 following a sudden illness. Following the death, President Donald Trump recommended that Governor Henry McMaster appoint the senator's sister, Darline Graham Nordone, to complete his term. Media coverage of the event has included tributes to the senator's career alongside reports on controversial public commentary regarding his death.
latest_clusters.confidence: HIGH. The sources consistently report the death of the senator and the subsequent recommendation made by the former president.

Counter-terrorism police have taken over the investigation into the death.
A 28-year-old man from Rotherham has been arrested in connection with the investigation.
Shabana Mahmood has offered Nigel Farage a meeting regarding security for high-profile politicians.

Home Secretary Shabana Mahmood has offered a security meeting to Nigel Farage amid Reform UK's concerns regarding the protection of their members. Police have urged the public to avoid speculation as they continue to investigate the circumstances surrounding the death.

shared_facts: Sheikh Hamad bin Khalifa Al Thani has died at the age of 74.
Sheikh Hamad bin Khalifa Al Thani served as the Emir of Qatar from 1995 to 2013.
Sheikh Hamad bin Khalifa Al Thani transferred power to his son in 2013.
Qatar experienced significant economic expansion and development of its natural gas resources during his reign.
latest_clusters.synthesis: Former Qatari Emir Sheikh Hamad bin Khalifa Al Thani has died at age 74 after an 18-year reign spanning 1995 to 2013. His tenure is noted for the transformation of Qatar's economy, specifically regarding the development of liquefied natural gas resources. He is remembered by associates as a central figure in shaping Qatar's modern domestic and international status.
latest_clusters.confidence: HIGH. All provided texts are from the same media organization and share consistent biographical and historical details.
